calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-21-2013 Off Calendar

Ntc Of Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar May-02-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.

Elizabeth MacDonald, Esq., appearing specially for Plaintiff, Cibibank N.A.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) Svetlana Poryes, an individual
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
Declaration of Susie DeSha admitted in evidence.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $27,660.57
Pre-Judgment Interest: $0.00
Attorney's Fees: $0.00
Costs: $475.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $28,135.57
Judgment signed in open court.
